3274150.name: 50 DOORS
3274150.description:
In this game, you have a unique chance to win a big prize! Your task is to go through a series of 50 rooms, but each room presents a challenge. In every room, two doors will appear in front of you – one will lead you further along the path to winning, while the other could send you back.

Rules:

  • Each room has two doors, and only one of them is the correct one.

  • The correct door is randomly chosen in each room, meaning there is no pattern to help you figure out which way to go.

  • If you pick the right door, you move on to the next room.

  • If you pick the wrong door, you might be sent back several rooms or have to start the entire journey again.

  • If you manage to pass through all 50 rooms, you win!

Luck is crucial – every choice is tense, and there's no way to know in advance which door is the right one. Will you take risks or play it safe? Can you make it all the way to the end and claim your well-deserved prize?
